name: drift-detector
description: Detects when Claude drifts away from your active output contract (a terse persona, hard formatting/length rules, an in-character voice) and quietly steers it back. Each assistant turn is scored by a deterministic, dependency-free engine; a status-line badge shows live drift and the next prompt gets a one-shot correction nudge when the previous reply broke contract.
_statusLine_NOTE: Claude Code's statusLine is a user-settings concept (settings.json), not a plugin-manifest field — the plugin schema has no 'statusLine' key, so it cannot be auto-installed from this manifest. The block below is the exact config install.sh merges into ~/.claude/settings.json (composing with any prior statusLine, which it saves to scripts/.prior-statusline). Run ./install.sh after enabling the plugin.
